Home.title: Foundation scaffold for a multi-tenant hosting SaaS
Home.description: Laravel 11, Next.js 14 App Router, PostgreSQL 16, Redis 7, and Docker Desktop are wired together without generating business modules ahead of schedule.
Home.backendDescription: Laravel is prepared for PostgreSQL, Redis-backed cache, session, and queue workloads, plus `/api/v1` routing and tenant-aware middleware.
Home.frontendDescription: Next.js starts with English and Arabic locale routing, `next-intl`, and HTML-level RTL switching for Arabic.
Home.servicesDescription: The compose stack brings up the required local infrastructure for the foundation phase.
Home.deliverable1: Repository structure for backend, frontend, docker, docs, and scripts
Home.deliverable2: Laravel 11 backend scaffold with shared-schema tenancy groundwork
Home.deliverable3: Next.js 14 App Router scaffold with locale and RTL support
Home.deliverable4: Dockerized PHP, Nginx, PostgreSQL, Redis, worker, scheduler, and Mailpit
Home.deliverable5: Environment templates for backend, frontend, and compose
